ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The future of .NET UI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-powershell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-powershell
Language: c%23
Microsoft Azure PowerShell

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AzureAD/microsoft-authentication-library-for-dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AzureAD/microsoft-authentication-library-for-dotnet
Language: c%23
Microsoft Authentication Library (MSAL) for .NET

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ErsatzTV/ErsatzTV-legacy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ErsatzTV/ErsatzTV-legacy
Language: c%23
Open-source platform that transforms your personal media library into live, custom TV channels.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
Language: c%23
Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MudBlazor/MudBlazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor
Language: c%23
Blazor Component Library based on Material Design principles. Do more with Blazor, utilizing CSS and keeping JavaScript to a bare minimum.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NuGet/NuGetGallery
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NuGet/NuGetGallery
Language: c%23
NuGet Gallery is a package repository that powers https://www.nuget.org. Use this repo for reporting NuGet.org issues.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SakiRinn/LiveCaptions-Translator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SakiRinn/LiveCaptions-Translator
Language: c%23
Lightweight and powerful real-time audio/speech translation tool based on Windows LiveCaptions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ShareX/ShareX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ShareX/ShareX
Language: c%23
ShareX is a free and open-source application that enables users to capture or record any area of their screen with a single keystroke. It also supports uploading images, text, and various file types to a wide range of destinations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kgrzybek/modular-monolith-with-ddd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kgrzybek/modular-monolith-with-ddd
Language: c%23
Full Modular Monolith application with Domain-Driven Design approach.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mgth/LittleBigMouse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mgth/LittleBigMouse
Language: c%23
DPI Aware mouse move across screens

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/aspire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/aspire
Language: c%23
Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
Language: c%23
Umbraco is a free and open source .NET content management system helping you deliver delightful digital experiences.
